reviews.comment:
He estado varias veces, es muy lindo, pero hoy tuve un percance con la alfombra que ya está muy vieja y me tropecé y caí al piso con toda mi humanidad. Fui socorrida gentilmente. Pero tendrían que solucionar antes que pase a mayores.

(Translated by Google)
I've been there several times, it's very nice, but today I had a mishap with the carpet, which is quite old, and I tripped and fell flat on my face. I was helped kindly. But they should fix it before it gets worse.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQweGF6b0RnEAE

reviews.comment:
Está ubicada enfrente norte de la terminal del sol, tiene sus servicios de grúas un punto de encuentro recurrente y muy utilizado por mucha gente, no atiende las 24hrs

(Translated by Google)
It is located opposite the north end of the Sun Terminal, its crane services are a frequent meeting point and very popular with many people, it does not operate 24 hours a day
